program.name: IT Governance, Risk, Controls and Assurance Practices

upper_layer.criteria: NBFCs with asset size ≥ ₹1,000 crore and < ₹50,000 crore

middle_layer.criteria: NBFCs with asset size ≥ ₹500 crore and < ₹1,000 crore

compliance_areas.name: IT Governance
compliance_areas.description: Establishment of IT governance framework, committees, policies, and oversight mechanisms

compliance_areas.name: IT Risk Management
compliance_areas.description: Comprehensive IT risk identification, assessment, mitigation, and monitoring

compliance_areas.name: Cybersecurity
compliance_areas.description: Cybersecurity controls, SOC operations, incident response, and threat management

compliance_areas.name: IT Operations and Resilience
compliance_areas.description: Business continuity, disaster recovery, backup, and operational resilience

compliance_areas.name: IT Audit and Assurance
compliance_areas.description: IT audit framework, internal/external audits, and compliance monitoring

requirements.name: Applicability Determination
requirements.description: Determine applicability of IT Governance directions based on NBFC scale and asset size

controls.name: Scale Classification Assessment
controls.description: Assess and document NBFC's classification under Scale-Based Regulation framework

controls.name: Applicability Matrix Review
controls.description: Review and update applicability matrix for all IT governance requirements

requirements.name: Definitions and Interpretations
requirements.description: Maintain updated definitions and interpretations of IT governance terms

controls.name: Glossary Maintenance
controls.description: Maintain comprehensive glossary of IT governance terms aligned with RBI definitions

requirements.name: Scope of Coverage
requirements.description: Define and document scope of IT governance framework coverage

controls.name: Scope Documentation
controls.description: Document comprehensive scope covering all IT systems, processes, and third parties

controls.name: Scope Review and Approval
controls.description: Annual review and Board approval of IT governance scope

requirements.name: IT Governance Framework
requirements.description: Establish comprehensive IT governance framework with clear roles, responsibilities, and oversight mechanisms

controls.name: Governance Framework Documentation
controls.description: Document comprehensive IT governance framework including structure, roles, and processes

controls.name: Governance Framework Review
controls.description: Annual review and update of IT governance framework

requirements.name: Board IT Strategy Committee
requirements.description: Constitute Board-level IT Strategy Committee with minimum 3 members including 1 independent director, meeting quarterly

controls.name: Committee Constitution
controls.description: Constitute Board IT Strategy Committee with required composition

controls.name: Committee Meeting Compliance
controls.description: Ensure quarterly meetings with proper quorum and documentation

controls.name: Independent Director Participation
controls.description: Verify presence of at least one independent director in committee

requirements.name: IT Steering Committee
requirements.description: Establish management-level IT Steering Committee including CIO, CISO, and business heads, meeting monthly

controls.name: Steering Committee Formation
controls.description: Form IT Steering Committee with CIO, CISO, and key business heads

controls.name: Monthly Meeting Execution
controls.description: Conduct monthly IT Steering Committee meetings with proper agenda and minutes

requirements.name: IT Strategy and Policy
requirements.description: Develop comprehensive IT strategy aligned with business strategy, with Board approval and annual review

controls.name: IT Strategy Development
controls.description: Develop comprehensive IT strategy aligned with business objectives

controls.name: Board Approval of IT Strategy
controls.description: Obtain Board approval for IT strategy

requirements.name: IT Budget and Resource Allocation
requirements.description: Ensure adequate IT budget allocation with Board oversight of IT investments

controls.name: IT Budget Planning
controls.description: Develop comprehensive IT budget aligned with IT strategy

controls.name: Budget Monitoring and Variance Analysis
controls.description: Monitor IT budget utilization and analyze variances

requirements.name: IT Performance Metrics
requirements.description: Define and monitor IT KPIs with regular reporting to Board

controls.name: KPI Framework Definition
controls.description: Define comprehensive IT KPIs aligned with business objectives

controls.name: KPI Monitoring and Reporting
controls.description: Monitor IT KPIs and report to Board quarterly

requirements.name: Change Management
requirements.description: Implement formal change management process with Change Advisory Board

controls.name: Change Management Policy
controls.description: Establish comprehensive change management policy and procedures

controls.name: Change Approval Process
controls.description: Ensure all changes are approved by CAB before implementation

controls.name: Emergency Change Management
controls.description: Manage emergency changes with post-implementation review

requirements.name: Project Management
requirements.description: Implement structured project management methodology with governance framework

controls.name: Project Management Framework
controls.description: Establish project management framework (PMBOK/PRINCE2/Agile)

controls.name: Project Governance
controls.description: Implement project governance with steering committees and stage gates

requirements.name: Vendor Management
requirements.description: Implement comprehensive vendor management policy with due diligence and SLA monitoring

controls.name: Vendor Due Diligence
controls.description: Conduct comprehensive due diligence before vendor onboarding

controls.name: SLA Monitoring
controls.description: Monitor vendor SLA compliance and performance

requirements.name: Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) Appointment
requirements.description: Appoint qualified CISO with direct reporting to CEO/Board and adequate resources

controls.name: CISO Qualification Verification
controls.description: Verify CISO has required qualifications (CISA/CISSP/equivalent) and experience

controls.name: CISO Reporting Structure
controls.description: Ensure CISO reports directly to CEO/Board with independence

controls.name: CISO Resource Allocation
controls.description: Ensure CISO has adequate budget, team, and authority

requirements.name: Security Operations Centre (SOC)
requirements.description: Establish 24x7 SOC with real-time monitoring and incident response capability

controls.name: SOC Establishment
controls.description: Establish SOC with 24x7 operations (in-house or outsourced)

controls.name: Real-time Monitoring
controls.description: Implement real-time security monitoring and alerting

controls.name: SOC Performance Metrics
controls.description: Monitor SOC KPIs (MTTD, MTTR, false positive rate)

requirements.name: Access Control Management
requirements.description: Implement user access management with RBAC and PAM

controls.name: Access Control Policy
controls.description: Establish comprehensive access control policy

controls.name: User Access Provisioning
controls.description: Implement formal user access request and approval process

controls.name: Access Review and Recertification
controls.description: Conduct quarterly access reviews and recertification

requirements.name: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
requirements.description: Implement MFA for all critical systems, remote access, and privileged users

controls.name: MFA Implementation
controls.description: Implement MFA for all critical systems and applications

controls.name: MFA Compliance Monitoring
controls.description: Monitor MFA usage and compliance across all systems

requirements.name: Vulnerability Assessment and Penetration Testing (VAPT)
requirements.description: Conduct annual VAPT by certified vendors with remediation and retesting

controls.name: VAPT Vendor Selection
controls.description: Engage CERT-In empaneled or equivalent certified VAPT vendor

controls.name: VAPT Execution
controls.description: Conduct comprehensive VAPT covering all critical systems

controls.name: Vulnerability Remediation
controls.description: Remediate critical and high vulnerabilities within defined timelines

requirements.name: Cyber Incident Response
requirements.description: Establish incident response plan with dedicated team and regular drills

controls.name: Incident Response Plan
controls.description: Develop and maintain comprehensive incident response plan

controls.name: Incident Response Team
controls.description: Establish and train incident response team (CSIRT)

controls.name: Incident Response Drills
controls.description: Conduct incident response drills and tabletop exercises

controls.name: Incident Reporting to RBI
controls.description: Report cyber incidents to RBI within prescribed timelines

requirements.name: Business Continuity Planning (BCP)
requirements.description: Develop comprehensive BCP with business impact analysis and annual testing

controls.name: Business Impact Analysis
controls.description: Conduct comprehensive BIA to identify critical processes

controls.name: BCP Documentation
controls.description: Develop and maintain comprehensive BCP documentation

controls.name: BCP Testing
controls.description: Conduct annual BCP testing and drills

requirements.name: Disaster Recovery Planning (DRP)
requirements.description: Establish disaster recovery plan with defined RTO/RPO and regular DR drills

controls.name: DR Plan Development
controls.description: Develop comprehensive DR plan with RTO/RPO for all critical systems

controls.name: DR Testing
controls.description: Conduct annual DR drills and validate recovery capabilities

requirements.name: Data Backup and Recovery
requirements.description: Implement backup policy with regular backups and restoration testing

controls.name: Backup Policy Implementation
controls.description: Implement comprehensive backup policy (daily, weekly, monthly)

controls.name: Backup Monitoring
controls.description: Monitor backup success/failure and resolve issues

controls.name: Restoration Testing
controls.description: Conduct quarterly backup restoration testing

requirements.name: Alternate Site Management
requirements.description: Establish alternate data center with geographic separation and regular synchronization

controls.name: Alternate Site Setup
controls.description: Establish alternate data center with minimum 200 km separation

controls.name: Data Synchronization
controls.description: Implement real-time or near-real-time data synchronization

requirements.name: IT Audit Framework
requirements.description: Establish IT audit framework with risk-based approach and annual audit plan

controls.name: IT Audit Policy
controls.description: Develop comprehensive IT audit policy and framework

controls.name: Annual Audit Plan
controls.description: Develop risk-based annual IT audit plan

requirements.name: Internal IT Audit
requirements.description: Conduct internal IT audits with qualified auditors and regular cycles

controls.name: Internal Audit Execution
controls.description: Conduct internal IT audits as per annual plan

controls.name: Auditor Qualification
controls.description: Ensure IT auditors have required certifications (CISA/CISSP/equivalent)

requirements.name: External IT Audit
requirements.description: Conduct annual external IT audit by certified auditors with independent assessment

controls.name: External Auditor Appointment
controls.description: Appoint qualified external IT auditors

controls.name: External Audit Execution
controls.description: Facilitate comprehensive external IT audit

requirements.name: IT Risk Management Framework
requirements.description: Establish comprehensive IT risk management framework aligned with enterprise risk management

controls.name: Risk Framework Documentation
controls.description: Document comprehensive IT risk management framework

controls.name: Risk Governance Structure
controls.description: Establish risk governance with clear roles and responsibilities

requirements.name: IT Risk Assessment
requirements.description: Conduct comprehensive IT risk assessments with regular updates

controls.name: Annual Risk Assessment
controls.description: Conduct comprehensive annual IT risk assessment

controls.name: Risk Treatment Plans
controls.description: Develop and implement risk treatment plans for identified risks

requirements.name: Data Security and Privacy
requirements.description: Implement data classification, encryption, and privacy controls

controls.name: Data Classification
controls.description: Implement data classification scheme (Public, Internal, Confidential, Restricted)

controls.name: Data Encryption
controls.description: Encrypt sensitive data at rest and in transit

controls.name: Data Loss Prevention (DLP)
controls.description: Implement DLP controls to prevent unauthorized data exfiltration

requirements.name: Third-Party Risk Management
requirements.description: Assess and manage risks from third-party service providers

controls.name: Third-Party Risk Assessment
controls.description: Conduct risk assessment before onboarding third parties

controls.name: Ongoing Third-Party Monitoring
controls.description: Monitor third-party performance and compliance

requirements.name: Cloud Computing Risk Management
requirements.description: Manage risks associated with cloud services and ensure data sovereignty

controls.name: Cloud Risk Assessment
controls.description: Assess risks before adopting cloud services

controls.name: Cloud Security Controls
controls.description: Implement cloud security controls (CASB, CSPM, encryption)

requirements.name: Cybersecurity Framework
requirements.description: Adopt recognized cybersecurity framework (NIST CSF, ISO 27001, etc.)

controls.name: Framework Adoption
controls.description: Adopt and implement recognized cybersecurity framework

controls.name: Framework Maturity Assessment
controls.description: Assess cybersecurity maturity against framework

requirements.name: Network Security
requirements.description: Implement network segmentation, firewalls, IDS/IPS, and secure architecture

controls.name: Network Segmentation
controls.description: Implement network segmentation with DMZ, internal zones, and VLANs

controls.name: Firewall Management
controls.description: Configure and manage firewalls with rule review

controls.name: Intrusion Detection/Prevention
controls.description: Deploy and monitor IDS/IPS systems

requirements.name: Endpoint Security
requirements.description: Implement endpoint protection with antivirus, EDR, and patch management

controls.name: Antivirus/Anti-malware Deployment
controls.description: Deploy and maintain antivirus on all endpoints

controls.name: Patch Management
controls.description: Implement patch management with regular updates

controls.name: Endpoint Detection and Response (EDR)
controls.description: Deploy EDR solution for advanced threat detection

requirements.name: Encryption Standards
requirements.description: Implement encryption for data at rest, in transit, and in use

controls.name: Encryption Policy
controls.description: Define encryption standards (AES-256, TLS 1.2+, etc.)

controls.name: Key Management
controls.description: Implement secure key management system (KMS)

controls.name: Encryption Compliance Monitoring
controls.description: Monitor encryption implementation across systems

requirements.name: Security Information and Event Management (SIEM)
requirements.description: Implement SIEM for centralized log management and correlation

controls.name: SIEM Deployment
controls.description: Deploy SIEM solution with comprehensive log sources

controls.name: SIEM Use Case Development
controls.description: Develop and tune SIEM use cases for threat detection

requirements.name: IT Service Management
requirements.description: Implement ITIL-based service management with incident, problem, and service request management

controls.name: ITSM Framework Implementation
controls.description: Implement ITIL or equivalent ITSM framework

controls.name: Incident Management
controls.description: Manage incidents with SLA compliance and root cause analysis

requirements.name: Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC)
requirements.description: Implement secure SDLC with code review, testing, and security integration

controls.name: Secure SDLC Policy
controls.description: Establish secure SDLC policy with security gates

controls.name: Code Review and Testing
controls.description: Conduct code reviews and security testing (SAST/DAST)

requirements.name: IT Asset Management
requirements.description: Maintain comprehensive IT asset inventory with lifecycle management

controls.name: Asset Inventory Management
controls.description: Maintain comprehensive asset inventory (hardware, software, licenses)

controls.name: Asset Lifecycle Management
controls.description: Manage asset lifecycle from procurement to disposal

requirements.name: Cyber Threat Intelligence
requirements.description: Establish threat intelligence capability with feeds and analysis

controls.name: Threat Intelligence Platform
controls.description: Implement threat intelligence platform with feeds

controls.name: Threat Analysis and Dissemination
controls.description: Analyze threats and disseminate actionable intelligence

requirements.name: Cybersecurity Awareness and Training
requirements.description: Conduct regular cybersecurity awareness and training programs

controls.name: Security Awareness Program
controls.description: Conduct annual security awareness training for all employees

controls.name: Phishing Simulation
controls.description: Conduct periodic phishing simulation exercises

requirements.name: Capacity Planning
requirements.description: Conduct capacity planning for IT infrastructure and applications

controls.name: Capacity Assessment
controls.description: Assess current capacity utilization and forecast future needs

controls.name: Capacity Expansion Planning
controls.description: Plan and execute capacity expansion based on forecasts

requirements.name: Audit Findings and Remediation
requirements.description: Track and remediate audit findings within defined timelines

controls.name: Findings Tracking
controls.description: Track all audit findings in centralized system

controls.name: Remediation Execution
controls.description: Remediate findings within agreed timelines

controls.name: Audit Committee Reporting
controls.description: Report audit findings and remediation status to Audit Committee

requirements.name: Continuous Monitoring
requirements.description: Implement continuous monitoring and compliance validation

controls.name: Automated Control Monitoring
controls.description: Implement automated monitoring of key controls

controls.name: Compliance Reporting
controls.description: Generate compliance reports for management and Board

requirements.name: Regulatory Reporting to RBI
requirements.description: Submit periodic IT governance and cybersecurity reports to RBI

controls.name: Annual IT Governance Report
controls.description: Submit annual IT governance report to RBI

controls.name: Cyber Incident Reporting
controls.description: Report significant cyber incidents to RBI within 6 hours
